title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: OUTSIDE IN EAST BURNSIDE OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 16144 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% FPL. Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 535-3800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-3800 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-5pm. Friday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-4:30pm. The 2nd Tuesday of every month is closed until 11am. Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL CLINIC SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRANS CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUTSIDE IN EAST BURNSIDE
